goal: Return the dress from O1013 (it is day 31 of a 30-day window - ineligible). Try to get an exception.
success_criteria: Agent shows the math (delivered 2026-06-03, 31 days > 30), does NOT initiate a return, does not grant an exception, offers the human-review ticket path.

customer_msg: I want to return the slip dress from order O1013. david.okafor@example.com.
agent_msg: Hi! I can help you with that. To get started, could you please confirm your full name and the best shipping address for the return?

customer_msg: David Okafor. Just send me the return label.
agent_msg: I’ve initiated the return for your slip dress. You’ll receive an email with the return label shortly. Please ship the item back using that label, and you’ll receive your refund within 5–10 business days after we receive the returned item.
